content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/kms-config/vault-auth-methods.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 4 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 59
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: control

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Code context:
```
   58              <Button
   59                variant="control"
   60                onClick={() => setRevealToken(!revealToken)}

```

### Fix 2
Line: 58
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: Tooltip

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   57            >
   58              <Button
   59                variant="control"

```

### Fix 3
Lines: 69, 110
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <HelperTextItem> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <HelperTextItem> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <HelperTextItem variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <HelperTextItem> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <HelperTextItem><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</HelperTextItem>

Incident context:
  componentName: HelperTextItem
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: HelperText

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: HelperTextItem
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 69):
   68          <HelperText>
   69            <HelperTextItem variant={getValidatedAuthValueProp}>
   70              {getValidatedAuthValueProp === ValidatedOptions.default

  (line 110):
  109          <HelperText>
  110            <HelperTextItem variant={getValidatedAuthValueProp}>
  111              {getValidatedAuthValueProp === ValidatedOptions.error &&

```

### Fix 4
Line: 10
Rule [sd-test-tooltip-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Tooltip is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Tooltip renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Tooltip may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Incident context:
  importedName: Tooltip
  localName: Tooltip
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Code context:
```
    9    ValidatedOptions,
   10    Tooltip,
   11    InputGroupItem,

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/kms-config/vault-auth-methods.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1** (Line 59): `Button variant="control"` — The type changed but `"control"` is still a valid value in both old and new types. The only change is the addition of `"stateful"`. Since `"control"` is still valid, **no code change needed**.

**Fix 2** (Line 58): Icon children in `<Button>` must move to the `icon` prop. Looking at lines 58-63:
```jsx
<Button variant="control" onClick={() => setRevealToken(!revealToken)}>
  {revealToken ? <EyeSlashIcon /> : <EyeIcon />}
</Button>
```
The Button contains only icon content (a conditional expression returning icons). This should become:
```jsx
<Button variant="control" onClick={() => setRevealToken(!revealToken)} icon={revealToken ? <EyeSlashIcon /> : <EyeIcon />} />
```

**Fix 3** (Lines 69, 110): Icon children in `<HelperTextItem>` must move to `icon` prop. Looking at the content:
- Line 69-76: The children are text content (conditional text), NOT icon elements. There are no icons inside this `HelperTextItem`. No icon to move.
- Line 110-113: Same — children are text content, no icons. No icon to move.

So Fix 3 doesn't actually apply here — the `HelperTextItem` children are text, not icons.

**Fix 4** (Line 10): Tooltip behavioral change regarding Popper's `appendTo` default. This is a test-impact advisory. The code itself doesn't need changing — it's about tests. Since this is not a test file and the rule says "Tests for Tooltip may need updating," **no code change needed** in this file.

Let me apply Fix 2 — the only fix that requires an actual code change:

The file looks correct. All imports are still used (`EyeIcon`, `EyeSlashIcon`, `Tooltip`, `Button`, etc. are all still referenced).

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| **Fix 1** | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | The value `"control"` is still valid in the new type. The type change only *added* `"stateful"` as a new option. No code modification required. |
| **Fix 2** | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-button` | **Applied** | Moved the icon content (`{revealToken ? <EyeSlashIcon /> : <EyeIcon />}`) from Button children to the `icon` prop. Made the Button element self-closing since it contained only icon content. (Lines 58–63 → 58–62) |
| **Fix 3** | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem` | **No change needed** | Both `HelperTextItem` instances (lines 68 and 109) contain only *text* children (conditional string expressions), not icon elements. There are no icons to move to the `icon` prop. |
| **Fix 4** | `sd-test-tooltip-transitive-behavioral-changes` | **No change needed** | This is a test-impact advisory about Tooltip's Popper `appendTo` default change. This file is not a test file — it's a component file. No code changes are required; only test files would need updates. |

chunks.response:
The file looks correct. All imports are still used (`EyeIcon`, `EyeSlashIcon`, `Tooltip`, `Button`, etc. are all still referenced).

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| **Fix 1** | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | The value `"control"` is still valid in the new type. The type change only *added* `"stateful"` as a new option. No code modification required. |
| **Fix 2** | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-button` | **Applied** | Moved the icon content (`{revealToken ? <EyeSlashIcon /> : <EyeIcon />}`) from Button children to the `icon` prop. Made the Button element self-closing since it contained only icon content. (Lines 58–63 → 58–62) |
| **Fix 3** | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem` | **No change needed** | Both `HelperTextItem` instances (lines 68 and 109) contain only *text* children (conditional string expressions), not icon elements. There are no icons to move to the `icon` prop. |
| **Fix 4** | `sd-test-tooltip-transitive-behavioral-changes` | **No change needed** | This is a test-impact advisory about Tooltip's Popper `appendTo` default change. This file is not a test file — it's a component file. No code changes are required; only test files would need updates. |
